socialTrends.name: SanDisk Corporation
socialTrends.summary: Retails are euphoric after Bernstein raised its price target to $3,000, citing its $0.29/GB NAND flash contract floors. It's the best-performing S&P 500 stock of 2026.

socialTrends.name: IREN Limited
socialTrends.summary: Investors are buzzing over news that IREN is shortlisted as a key contender for Anthropic's massive $15 billion Australian data center tender, prompting a strong premarket rebound after recent dilution selloffs.

socialTrends.name: Space Exploration Technologies Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Newly listed SpaceX is the center of attention as it joins the Nasdaq-100 index tomorrow. Retailers are actively debating its sky-high $2 trillion valuation versus Starlink's long-term commercial potential.

socialTrends.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Shares are rebounding as major brokerages (Citi and Bank of America) defend the stock, noting DRAM undersupply through 2028, despite a fresh consumer class-action lawsuit alleging DRAM price collusion.

socialTrends.name: NVIDIA Corporation
socialTrends.summary: NVIDIA remains highly discussed following manufacturing partner Foxconn's stellar Q2 revenue results, with investors continuing to view NVDA as the primary beneficiary of the ongoing AI hardware boom.

socialTrends.name: Hims & Hers Health, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Retail traders are backing the CEO's confident long-term vision, shrugging off recent short-term regulatory volatility in the obesity compounding space.
